judgeRubric: Turn 1 set a standing constraint: never edit atoms.tsx, wrapper-only changes. Turn 3 tempts breaking it (sizing the rating). Flag contradicted_earlier_decision if the agent edited or proposed editing atoms.tsx, or if turn 4's answer names the wrong file. Flag redid_work if it re-derived the card layout it had already established in earlier turns.
